summary: Iteration 41: Landing page redesign frontend testing completed successfully. All sections render correctly, CTAs navigate to proper URLs, pricing toggle works, mobile menu functions correctly, no horizontal overflow or console errors detected.
passed_tests: Landing page renders at `/` with data-testid='syroce-landing-page'
Hero section: title, subtitle, 2 CTAs (Trial + Demo), trust signals all visible
Trust bar: 4 metrics cards rendered correctly
Problem section: 3 problem cards + toggle (Eski düzen vs Syroce ile) working
Solution section: 4 solution cards with icons and stats visible
Product preview section: 3 preview cards with mockup panels
How It Works section: 3 step cards visible
ROI section: dark card with stats and points
B2B Network section: 3 network points visible
Pricing section: monthly/yearly toggle working, Pro card featured (dark bg)
Final CTA section: Trial + Demo buttons visible
Footer: copy text and links rendered
CTA redirections: Trial CTAs -> /signup?plan=trial, Demo CTAs -> /login
Mobile menu: toggle opens/closes correctly, CTAs work
No console errors on desktop, tablet, or mobile
LandingDashboardMockup component: KPIs, reservation panel, CRM, finance all render
critical_code_review_comments: PublicHomePage.jsx: Well-structured with comprehensive data-testid coverage for all interactive elements
LandingDashboardMockup.jsx: Proper testIdPrefix prop usage allows multiple instances with unique selectors
LandingSectionHeading.jsx: Clean reusable component with proper data-testid structure
Responsive design: Mobile menu toggle correctly hides desktop nav, no overflow issues
seed_data_creation: None - landing page is static with no backend data requirements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 validated the landing page redesign. All sections (Hero, Trust bar, Problem, Solution, Product preview, How It Works, ROI, B2B Network, Pricing, Final CTA, Footer) render correctly. CTAs navigate to correct URLs (/signup?plan=trial for trial, /login for demo). Pricing toggle switches between monthly/yearly plans. Mobile menu works. No overflow or console errors. Landing page uses CSS/HTML mockups with no external API calls.

feature_validation_summary.hero_section: PASS - Title, subtitle, CTAs, trust signals visible
feature_validation_summary.problem_section: PASS - Toggle between old/new view working

mocked_apis.note: Landing page does not make any API calls. All dashboard mockups are CSS/HTML components.
